input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.10.3.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.10.3.3
            TITLE: incorrect laps

            CONTENT:
            rule D.10.3.3: Incorrect Laps
D.10.3.3 Incorrect Laps 
Vehicles that run an incorrect number of laps or run the laps in the wrong sequence will be 
DNF for that run.

final_answer: rule D.10.3.3: Incorrect Laps D.10.3.3 Incorrect Laps Vehicles that run an incorrect number of laps or run the laps in the wrong sequence will be DNF for that run.
